title: Meta Graph API Page
description: Represents a Facebook Page as returned by the Graph API Page node. Includes identity, category, contact information, location, and engagement metrics.

id.description: The unique numeric identifier for the Page.

about.description: Short description of the Page (deprecated in newer API versions, see 'bio').

bio.description: Biography or long description of the Page.

category.description: The primary category of the Page.

category_list.description: All categories assigned to the Page.

source.description: URL of the cover photo image.

description_html.description: The description of the Page in HTML format.

display_subtext.description: The sub-text displayed under the Page name (e.g. category or location).

emails.description: Email addresses listed on the Page.

fan_count.description: The number of users who like/follow the Page.

followers_count.description: The number of followers of the Page.

founded.description: When the entity represented by the Page was founded.

global_brand_page_name.description: The name of the global brand Page, if this Page is part of a global brand structure.

hours.description: Operating hours for the business. Keys are day identifiers (e.g. mon_1_open, mon_1_close).

is_published.description: Whether the Page is published and publicly visible.

is_verified.description: Whether the Page has been verified by Facebook.

location.description: The physical location of the business.

phone.description: The phone number of the business.

single_line_address.description: The Page's address formatted as a single line.

username.description: The alias/vanity URL name for the Page.

verification_status.description: The verification status of the Page (e.g. blue_verified, gray_verified, not_verified).

website.description: The URL of the website associated with the Page.

were_here_count.description: The number of check-ins at this place.

whatsapp_number.description: The WhatsApp number associated with the Page.

rating_count.description: The number of ratings for the Page.

overall_star_rating.description: Overall star rating of the Page based on user ratings (out of 5).

talking_about_count.description: The number of people talking about the Page.

access_token.description: The Page access token (only returned when a Page admin queries with manage_pages permission).
